items.title: Revamp Platform Rank Icon and ACE Coin Page in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update restores the platform rank navigation and updates the page icon to a trophy. The ACE coin page layout has been refined to a row structure, enhancing user experience. Additionally, unstable icons have been replaced with registered Font Awesome icons for consistency.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates from zh-CN in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This PR introduces automatic translation updates for internationalization (i18n) based on changes from the zh-CN source. Key modifications include updates to multiple language files, enhancing the user experience for various locales. The changes ensure that users across different languages have access to the latest content and features.

items.title: Revamped coin page with clean el-card layout and enhanced order list in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: The coin page was redesigned using a standard el-row/el-col/el-card layout, removing custom colors in favor of theme CSS variables. Key features include proper stat cards, ACE balance as a separate card, tiers displayed as a table with progress bars, visible icons, and actions via el-button. Additionally, the order list page received layout improvements for better clarity and usability. These updates improve UI consistency and user experience across the platform.

items.title: Revamp Platform Rank Page Layout and Icons in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update enhances the platform rank page by implementing a full-width layout and adding missing Font Awesome icons. Key changes include the introduction of avatars in the podium and table, a refined color scheme, and the removal of the bottom section for a cleaner look. Overall, these improvements aim to provide a more engaging user experience.

items.title: Enhance order page with new FontAwesome icons in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update registers several missing FontAwesome icons, including faReceipt, faDollarSign, faClock, and faFileExport, for use on the order page summary cards and export button. Previously, these icons were not registered, resulting in empty circle placeholders. With this fix, the order page will now display the correct icons, improving user experience.

items.title: Enhance Chinese Documentation with Nexior Links in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update adds quick-entry link blocks to the Chinese Nexior deployment guides and includes missing Hub and Nexior repository links in promotional and earning articles. Inline references to Nexior and Hub have also been improved in the main promotional documents, enhancing accessibility for Chinese users.

items.title: Revamp Order Page Style and Filters in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: The order page has been updated to align with the distribution page style, enhancing visual consistency. Filters are now streamlined into a single row, accompanied by an export button for improved functionality. These changes aim to enhance user experience and accessibility.

items.title: Enhance Async Task Submission Flow in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: This update enforces asynchronous submission for long-running MCP media tools by default, ensuring quicker responses with task IDs. It also introduces explicit polling guidance in task-based MCP responses, improving user experience. Focused tests have been added and updated to validate the new submit-then-poll behavior.

items.title: Improve async task polling flow with explicit guidance in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: This update enforces asynchronous submission for long-running MCP media tools by default, ensuring quick returns with a task ID. It adds explicit polling instructions in task-based MCP responses to guide users on how to check task completion. The changes include new and updated tests to validate the submit-then-poll behavior, enhancing reliability and clarity in task handling.

items.title: Enhance MCP Async Task Submission Flow in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the MCP media tools by enforcing asynchronous submission for long-running tasks. It includes explicit polling guidance in the responses, ensuring users know how to check task statuses effectively. Additionally, focused tests have been added to validate the new submit-then-poll behavior, enhancing overall reliability.

items.title: Enhance MCP Async Task Flow in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the MCP media tools by enforcing asynchronous submissions by default for long-running tasks. It introduces explicit polling guidance in task responses and includes focused tests for the new submit-then-poll behavior. These changes aim to streamline user interactions and enhance overall efficiency.

items.title: Improve async task polling and submission flow in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: This update enforces asynchronous submission for long-running MCP media tools, ensuring they return quickly with a task ID. It introduces explicit polling guidance in task-based MCP responses and enhances tests to cover the new submit-then-poll behavior. These changes improve clarity and reliability in handling asynchronous media processing tasks.

items.title: Enhance MCP Async Task Submission in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: This update enforces asynchronous submission for long-running MCP media tools by default, ensuring quicker responses with task IDs. It also provides explicit polling guidance in task-based responses, enhancing user experience. Focused tests have been added to validate the new submit-then-poll behavior.

items.title: Enhance MCP Async Task Submission in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update implements a default asynchronous submission mode for long-running MCP media tools, ensuring quicker responses with task IDs. It also provides explicit polling guidance in task responses and includes focused tests for the new behavior. These changes improve user experience by streamlining the submission and polling process.

items.title: Enhance async task polling with explicit guidance in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update enforces asynchronous submission for long-running MCP media tools, ensuring they return quickly with a task ID. It adds explicit polling instructions to task-based MCP responses and introduces new tests to validate the submit-then-poll workflow. These changes improve clarity and reliability when handling async media generation tasks.

items.title: Enhance MCP Async Task Handling in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update forces long-running MCP media tools to submit tasks asynchronously by default, improving response times. It also provides explicit polling guidance with task-based responses, ensuring users know how to check task statuses. Focused tests have been added and updated to validate the new submit-then-poll behavior.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Application Management UI in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new OAuth Application management interface within the AuthFrontend user console. Users can now access an OAuth App List and Detail pages, along with a Create/Edit dialog for managing application details such as name, description, and redirect URIs. The implementation also includes necessary routing and internationalization support.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates for Multiple Languages in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces automated translation updates for internationalization (i18n) from the Chinese (zh-CN) source. Key modifications include enhancements across various language files, ensuring a more seamless user experience for Arabic, German, English, Spanish, French, Italian, and Japanese users. The changes improve the accuracy and relevance of translations throughout the platform.

items.title: Revamped Platform Ranking Page with Modern UI in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: The Platform Ranking page has been redesigned to feature a modern user interface, including a Top 3 podium, summary cards, and enhanced search functionality. This update transitions the page from admin-only access to common navigation, improving accessibility for all users. Key backend changes support the new features and layout.

items.title: Enhance platform-rank API with new features in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the platform-rank API by adding a summary field to the response, which includes total participants, total price, total reward, and total invitees. It also introduces a search parameter for filtering results by username or user ID and supports all-time queries without specifying start and end times. Additionally, a crash related to invitee count queries has been fixed.

items.title: Clean up OAuth consent page by removing user badge in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: The user badge has been removed from the OAuth consent page to enhance the visual appeal. This change eliminates the placeholder that appeared when users did not have an avatar, resulting in a cleaner interface. Overall, this update improves user experience during the OAuth process.

items.title: Automatic i18n Updates from zh-CN in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces automatic translation updates for the i18n files based on changes from the zh-CN source. Key modifications include enhancements to the order.json files across multiple languages, improving the user experience for Arabic, English, French, Korean, Portuguese, and Russian users. The changes ensure that the translations are up-to-date and consistent with the latest content.

items.title: Revamped Orders Console with Enhanced Features in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: The Orders console page has been completely redesigned to include summary cards, advanced filters for state, payment method, and date range, as well as a CSV export feature. This update significantly improves the user experience and data accessibility, relying on backend support for summary and export functionalities.

items.title: Enhance order management with summary and CSV export endpoints in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new endpoints for order summaries and CSV exports, enhancing functionality for regular users. Users can now filter orders by state, payment method, and date range, which supports the redesigned Orders console page. These changes aim to improve user experience and streamline order management.

items.title: Automatic i18n Translation Updates in Frontend Web 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces auto-generated i18n translation updates from the zh-CN source, enhancing the multilingual support of the platform. Key modifications include updates to translation files for multiple languages, ensuring a more consistent user experience across different locales.

items.title: Revamp Coin Page with Modern UI in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: The coin page has undergone a significant redesign, featuring a modern user interface that enhances user experience. Key updates include new sections for current discounts and tiers, along with a visually appealing hero section. This update aims to improve engagement and provide clearer information to users.

items.title: Enhance API Security with OAuth2 Scope Enforcement in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces OAuth2 scope enforcement for various API endpoints in the PlatformBackend. Key changes include the addition of OAuthScopePermission to Application, Credential, Order, Balance, and Usage ViewSets, ensuring that only authorized users can access specific resources. Non-OAuth tokens will bypass these checks, maintaining backward compatibility.

items.title: Enhance OAuth2 Open Platform with Scopes and CRUD API in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update significantly expands the OAuth2 Open Platform by increasing the number of available scopes from 2 to 17 and embedding these scopes within JWTs for enhanced access control. Additionally, a self-service OAuth Application CRUD API has been introduced, allowing users to manage their applications efficiently. The discovery endpoint has also been updated to reflect these changes, improving overall functionality.

items.title: Dynamic OAuth App Icons Now Live in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: The frontend now dynamically displays OAuth app icons sourced directly from the database, enhancing visual consistency and flexibility. Key changes include a new layout for the logo bridge and the removal of the static Logo component, replaced by the ACE icon. This update supports individual OAuth apps for each MCP server, improving user experience across the platform.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Authentication in M C P Short U R L 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an individual OAuth client ID environment variable for each MCP server, enabling tailored OAuth authentication. Each server now has a dedicated OAuth application with its own name, icon, and redirect URI, enhancing the user experience by displaying the correct service icon on the consent page.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Authentication in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an individual OAuth client ID environment variable for each MCP server, enabling tailored OAuth authentication. Each server now has a dedicated OAuth application in the database, complete with its own name, icon, and redirect URI, enhancing the user experience by displaying the correct service icon on the OAuth consent page.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Authentication in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an individual OAuth client ID environment variable for each MCP server, enabling tailored OAuth authentication. Each server now has a dedicated OAuth application in the database, complete with a unique name, icon, and redirect URI, enhancing the user experience by displaying the correct service icon on the consent page.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Authentication in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an individual OAuth client ID environment variable for each MCP server, enabling tailored OAuth authentication. Each server now has its own OAuth application with a unique name, icon, and redirect URI, enhancing the user experience by displaying the correct service icon on the OAuth consent page.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Authentication with Individual Client IDs in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new environment variable, ACEDATACLOUD_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID, enabling individual OAuth authentication for each MCP server. Each server now has its own OAuth application in the database, complete with a unique name, icon, and redirect URI, enhancing the user experience by displaying the correct service icon on the OAuth consent page.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Authentication in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an individual OAuth client ID environment variable for each MCP server, enabling tailored OAuth authentication. Each server now has its own OAuth application with a unique name, icon, and redirect URI, enhancing the user experience by displaying the correct service icon on the consent page.

items.title: Enhanced OAuth Support in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an individual OAuth client ID environment variable for each MCP server, enhancing OAuth authentication. Each server now has a dedicated OAuth application in the database, complete with a unique name, icon, and redirect URI, allowing for a tailored OAuth consent experience.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Authentication in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an individual OAuth client ID environment variable for each MCP server, enhancing per-server OAuth authentication. Each server now has a dedicated OAuth application in the database, complete with its own name, icon, and redirect URI, allowing for a more personalized OAuth consent experience.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Authentication in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an individual OAuth client ID for each MCP server, enhancing per-server OAuth authentication. Each server now has a dedicated OAuth application with its own name, icon, and redirect URI, allowing for a more personalized OAuth consent experience.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Authentication in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an individual OAuth client ID environment variable for each MCP server, enabling tailored OAuth authentication. Each server now has a dedicated OAuth application in the database, complete with its own name, icon, and redirect URI, enhancing the user experience by displaying the correct service icon on the consent page.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Authentication in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an individual OAuth client ID environment variable for each MCP server, enhancing OAuth authentication. Each server now has a dedicated OAuth application with its own name, icon, and redirect URI, allowing for a tailored OAuth consent experience.

items.title: Enhance chat completion records with full response body in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update allows non-streaming chat completion requests to include the full response body in the record payload sent to Gateway, enhancing visibility on the usage dashboard. For streaming responses, only usage data remains unchanged. Key modifications were made in chat_base.py to capture and include the response body effectively.

items.title: Enhance Deployment Workflow for K8s in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a crucial K8s deployment step to the existing deploy workflow. It now includes setting the kubectl context and executing the deployment script, ensuring that Docker images are not only built and pushed but also deployed to the US Silicon Valley cluster. This enhancement improves the automation and reliability of our deployment process.

items.title: Revamp View Details Button Style in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update transforms the 'View Details' link into a compact button for improved usability. The button now features a plain style and a smaller size, enhancing the overall interface design. These changes aim to streamline user interactions within the application.

items.title: Enhance FastMCP with Icon Support in M C P Nano Banana 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces an icon feature to the FastMCP initialization, allowing Claude.ai to display the correct NanoBanana icon. The modification includes the addition of an Icon class from the mcp.types module, enhancing the visual representation of the server. Overall, this change improves user experience by ensuring accurate branding.

items.title: Enhance MCP with Server Icon in M C P Short U R L 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces an icon to the FastMCP initialization process, ensuring that Claude.ai displays the correct ShortURL icon. The change enhances the visual representation of the MCP server, improving user experience and branding consistency.

items.title: Enhance MCP with Server Icon in M C P Seedream 🎨
items.summary: This update adds an icon to the FastMCP initialization, ensuring that Claude.ai displays the correct Seedream icon. The change involves modifying the server initialization code to include the new icon, enhancing the visual representation of the server. This improvement aims to provide a better user experience.

items.title: Enhance API Dropdown with Filterable Search in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a filterable property to the API dropdown on the Usage History page. Users can now easily type and search through the API list, improving navigation and usability. This change streamlines the user experience by reducing the need to scroll through long lists.

items.title: Enhance MCP with Server Icon in M C P Seedance 🎨
items.summary: This update adds a server icon to the MCP metadata, ensuring that Claude.ai displays the correct Seedance icon. The modification in the FastMCP initialization allows for a more visually appealing representation of the server. This change enhances user experience and branding consistency.

items.title: Enhance MCP with New Server Icon in M C P Flux 🎨
items.summary: This update adds an icon to the FastMCP initialization, ensuring that Claude.ai displays the correct Flux icon. The change involves modifying the server initialization code to include the new icon source. This enhancement improves the visual representation of the MCP server.

items.title: Enhance FastMCP with New Server Icon in M C P Veo 🎨
items.summary: This update adds a server icon to the FastMCP initialization, ensuring that Claude.ai displays the correct Veo icon. The modification in the core/server.py file includes the addition of an Icon class to manage the new icon. This change enhances the visual representation of the server in the application.

items.title: Enhance MCP with Icon Support in M C P Sora 🎨
items.summary: This update adds an icon to the FastMCP initialization, ensuring that Claude.ai displays the correct Sora icon. The change involves modifying the server initialization code to include the new icon parameter. This enhancement improves the visual representation of the MCP server.

items.title: Add server icon to MCP metadata for better Claude.ai display in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update adds an icon to the FastMCP initialization, ensuring that Claude.ai correctly displays the Luma server icon. The change modifies the server setup by including an icon URL in the MCP metadata. This enhancement improves visual identification and branding within the MCP Luma environment.

items.title: Add server icon to MCP metadata for accurate display in M C P Midjourney 🎨
items.summary: The FastMCP initialization now includes a server icon, ensuring Claude.ai shows the correct Midjourney icon. This update modifies the core server configuration to enhance visual identification and branding. The change involves adding an icon URL to the MCP metadata.

items.title: Enhance FastMCP with Server Icon in M C P Suno 🎨
items.summary: This update adds a server icon to the FastMCP initialization, ensuring that Claude.ai displays the correct Suno icon. The modification includes importing the Icon class and updating the FastMCP instantiation to include the new icon. This change enhances the visual representation of the server in user interfaces.

items.title: Enhance MCP with Service Icons in M C P Serp 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces an icons parameter to the FastMCP, allowing Claude.ai to display the appropriate service icon. The modification in core/server.py adds a new Icon import and updates the FastMCP initialization to include the icon URL. This enhancement improves the visual representation of services in the MCP.

items.title: Improve Solana RPC transaction fetch reliability with extended retries in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update increases the Solana RPC retry attempts from 6 to 12 with a progressive backoff strategy, extending the total wait time from 3 seconds to approximately 15 seconds. The change addresses intermittent failures in fetching transaction payloads during bulk payments by allowing more time for RPC propagation delays. Additionally, failure logging has been enhanced to aid in troubleshooting.

items.title: Update FontAwesome Icons to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons package from version 6.7.2 to 7.2.0. The change enhances the icon library available for use, ensuring access to the latest icons and improvements. Additionally, the package.json and yarn.lock files have been modified to reflect this update.

items.title: Update appkit-universal-connector to latest version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @reown/appkit-universal-connector from version 1.8.15 to 1.8.19. Key improvements include serialization of CAIP addresses and chain IDs into all accounts, along with various dependency updates that enhance overall functionality and performance.

items.title: Update Autoprefixer to 10.4.27 with performance and fix improvements in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps Autoprefixer from version 10.4.21 to 10.4.27. Key changes include reduced package size, faster processing, fixed broken gradients on CSS custom properties, and removal of the development key from package.json. These improvements enhance CSS compatibility and build efficiency in the frontend environment.

items.title: Upgrade vite-bundle-visualizer to 1.2.1 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the vite-bundle-visualizer package from version 1.0.1 to 1.2.1, introducing several improvements. Key changes include a new command-line argument for build mode and various documentation fixes. This upgrade enhances the functionality and usability of the bundle visualizer tool.

items.title: Update API Key for Veo Deployment in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the veo deployment configuration to use API_KEY_2, which is specifically provisioned for Veo model channels. The previous API_KEY was tied to the NanoBanana group, which lacked the necessary channels. This change ensures proper functionality for the veo service.

items.title: Fix action validation for request body in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the action validation logic to utilize the request body directly, ensuring that requests without an explicit action are handled correctly. Previously, the local variable defaulted to 'text2video', which led to unnecessary rejections of valid requests. This change enhances the robustness of the action handling in the service.

items.title: Improve retry logic by recreating FormData and handling 503 errors in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update moves the creation of FormData inside the retry loop in createVeoVideo() to prevent empty request bodies on retries, fixing socket hang up errors. Additionally, it adds handling for HTTP 503 status codes in handleVeoRequestError, improving the robustness of the request process. These changes enhance reliability when making POST requests in the Platform Service.

items.title: Upgrade Docker Buildx Action to v4 for Improved CI and Deployment in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the docker/setup-buildx-action from version 1 and 3 to version 4 in the CI and deployment workflows. The upgrade includes switching to Node 24 as the default runtime, removal of deprecated inputs/outputs, and various dependency updates. These changes enhance build performance and maintain compatibility with the latest GitHub Actions runner versions.

items.title: Upgrade Python Setup Action to Version 6 in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the actions/setup-python from version 5 to 6, ensuring compatibility with Node 24. Key enhancements include support for pip-version and improved reading from .python-version files. Additionally, several bug fixes and dependency updates have been implemented to enhance overall functionality.

items.title: Update Python Dependencies for Enhanced Performance in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This PR updates the Python dependencies in the project, including significant upgrades to djangorestframework, loguru, and requests. The changes enhance compatibility and performance, ensuring the application runs smoothly with the latest features and security patches. The poetry.lock and pyproject.toml files have been modified to reflect these updates.

items.title: Automate dependency updates and enhance CI workflow in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot configuration to automate dependency updates for npm packages weekly, and Docker images and GitHub Actions monthly. Additionally, the CI deployment workflow has been upgraded with newer versions of key GitHub Actions, improving build and deployment reliability. These changes streamline maintenance and enhance the development pipeline.

items.title: Revamp Deploy Workflow and Dependabot Formatting in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the deploy workflow by pinning key actions to their latest stable versions, ensuring better maintenance and tracking for Dependabot. Additionally, the Dependabot configuration has been reformatted to align with the project's Prettier style, promoting consistency across the repository.

items.title: Update Sora Version Handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the Sora worker version checks from an integer to a string format, specifically changing version 2 to '2.0'. This change is implemented across multiple handler files to ensure consistency and prevent errors related to version checks. It is a companion update to the PlatformBackend PR, enhancing the overall stability of the service.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates from Chinese in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces auto-generated internationalization (i18n) translation updates based on changes from the Chinese (zh-CN) source. Key modifications include updates to various language files, enhancing the application's multilingual support and ensuring consistency across different languages.

items.title: Enhanced Video Creation Timeout in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: The timeout for the video creation process in the wcnb API has been increased from 30 seconds to 120 seconds. This change addresses issues where the initial POST request could exceed the previous limit, ensuring smoother video creation experiences.

items.title: Enhance Usage History with Request/Response Details in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new Detail button in the API usage table, allowing users to view full request and response JSON data stored in metadata. The enhancement includes a modal dialog with tabs for Request and Response, displaying the data in a user-friendly format. Additionally, internationalization support has been added for both English and Chinese languages.

items.title: Enhance ApiUsage with Request/Response Metadata in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the storage of sanitized request and response details in the ApiUsage metadata during the recording phase. Key changes include the extraction of relevant request data such as headers and JSON body, as well as response data like status and headers, while ensuring sensitive information is stripped. This enhancement allows the frontend to display detailed usage history per request, improving user visibility.

items.title: Enable VEO Deployment in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: The VEO deployment has been re-enabled in the CI/CD pipeline by updating the run.sh script. Previously commented-out lines have been restored, allowing for the deployment of VEO alongside the nanobanana service. This change enhances the deployment capabilities of the Platform Service.

items.title: Enhance wcnb with Veo Video Generation Support in Platform Service 🎥
items.summary: This update introduces Veo video generation capabilities to the wcnb worker, integrating with the wcnb.ai OpenAI-compatible video API. Key changes include the implementation of video generation and information retrieval methods, the addition of a new handler for video requests, and updates to deployment configurations. This enhancement streamlines video processing and expands the functionality of the platform.

items.title: Updated Favicon to Google Icon in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the generic AceData logo with the Google G icon for the favicon of the Serp MCP server. The change enhances brand recognition and aligns the server's visual identity with Google. The modification involved a simple redirect update in the main.py file.

items.title: Enhance Usage Metadata with Cached Tokens in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the fields 'cached_tokens' and 'cached_creation_tokens' to the usage record metadata, making them visible on the usage console page. Previously, these values were only utilized for Gateway billing and not stored in the metadata. This enhancement applies to both Claude Messages API and OpenAI Chat Completions API.

items.title: Revert HTTP endpoint path to /mcp and update documentation in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP endpoint path from /mc back to /mcp to maintain consistency. Corresponding changes were made in the README to reflect the correct endpoint URL. These adjustments ensure proper API connectivity and improve user guidance for integration.

items.title: Revert endpoint path to /mcp and update documentation in M C P Short U R L 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP endpoint path from /mc back to /mcp to maintain consistency. The README has been updated accordingly to reflect this change, ensuring accurate setup instructions. These adjustments help prevent integration issues and improve user experience.

items.title: Revert HTTP Endpoint Path for Clarity in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP path from `/mc` back to `/mcp` to maintain consistency. The README has been updated accordingly to reflect this change, ensuring users have the correct endpoint information. These adjustments enhance clarity for developers integrating with the API.

items.title: Revert HTTP Endpoint Path for Clarity in M C P Seedance 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP path from `/mc` back to `/mcp`, ensuring consistency with the documentation. The README has been updated accordingly to reflect this change, enhancing clarity for users. Additionally, minor adjustments were made in the main.py file to align with the reverted endpoint.

items.title: Revert HTTP endpoint path to /mcp and update documentation in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP endpoint path from /mc back to /mcp to ensure consistency. The README file has been updated accordingly to reflect this change, improving clarity for users integrating with the MCP server. The main application code was also adjusted to align with the restored endpoint path.

items.title: Revert HTTP Endpoint Path to /mcp in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP endpoint path from /mc back to /mcp, ensuring compatibility with existing integrations. The README has been updated to reflect this change, providing clear instructions for users. Additionally, the main.py file has been modified to align with the new endpoint configuration.

items.title: Revert HTTP endpoint path to /mcp and update documentation in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP endpoint path from /mc back to /mcp to maintain consistency. Corresponding changes were made in the README to reflect the correct endpoint URL. These adjustments ensure proper client connectivity and accurate documentation.

items.title: Revert HTTP Endpoint Path to /mcp in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP endpoint path from /mc back to /mcp, ensuring compatibility with existing integrations. The README has been updated accordingly to reflect this change. This fix enhances clarity for users accessing the API.

items.title: Revert HTTP Endpoint Path for Clarity in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP path from `/mc` back to `/mcp`, ensuring consistency across the documentation and implementation. The README has been updated accordingly to reflect this change, enhancing clarity for users. Additionally, minor adjustments were made in the main.py file to align with the reverted path.

items.title: Revert endpoint path to /mcp and update documentation in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP endpoint path from /mc back to /mcp to ensure consistency and correct routing. Corresponding changes were made to the README to reflect the accurate endpoint URL. These adjustments improve clarity and maintain proper API functionality for users.

items.title: Revert HTTP Endpoint Path to /mcp in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update reverts the streamable HTTP endpoint path from /mc back to /mcp, ensuring consistency with the API documentation. The README has been updated accordingly to reflect this change. This adjustment enhances clarity for users interacting with the API.

items.title: Revamp README with New Endpoint and OAuth Details in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: The README has been updated to reflect recent changes, including the transition of all endpoint URLs from /mcp to /mc. Additionally, a new section for connecting to Claude.ai via OAuth has been added, eliminating the need for an API token. The environment variables table has also been updated to include ACEDATACLOUD_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID and ACEDATACLOUD_PLATFORM_BASE_URL.

items.title: Migrate to OAuth 2.0, add favicon, and update endpoint in M C P Short U R L 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the previous SSO system with OAuth 2.0 PKCE for improved authentication flow. The API endpoint has been changed from /mcp to /mc, and a favicon redirect has been added for branding consistency. Additionally, a new oauth_client_id configuration option was introduced to support the OAuth integration.

items.title: Upgrade to OAuth 2.0 and Enhance Features in M C P Seedream 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the previous SSO implementation with OAuth 2.0 PKCE for improved security and user experience. The API endpoint has been changed from /mcp to /mc, and a favicon has been added for better branding. Additionally, the configuration now includes an oauth_client_id to streamline the authentication process.

items.title: Migrate to OAuth 2.0 with new endpoint and favicon in M C P Flux 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the previous SSO system with OAuth 2.0 PKCE for improved authentication. The API endpoint has been changed from /mcp to /mc, and a favicon redirect has been added for better branding. Additionally, an oauth_client_id configuration option was introduced to support the new OAuth flow, enhancing integration with Claude.ai and other clients.

items.title: Enhanced OAuth 2.0 Integration and Endpoint Update in M C P Veo 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the previous SSO with OAuth 2.0 PKCE for enhanced security and user authentication. The main endpoint has been changed from '/mcp' to '/mc', and a favicon has been added for improved branding. Additionally, configuration for the OAuth client ID has been introduced, streamlining the integration process.

items.title: Upgrade to OAuth 2.0 and Enhance Features in M C P Sora 🚀
items.summary: This update migrates the authentication method from SSO to OAuth 2.0 PKCE, improving security and user experience. The endpoint has been changed from `/mcp` to `/mc`, and a favicon has been added for better branding. Additionally, the configuration now includes an `oauth_client_id`, streamlining the OAuth integration process.

items.title: Enhanced OAuth 2.0 Integration and Endpoint Update in M C P Luma 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the existing SSO with OAuth 2.0 PKCE for improved security and user experience. The main endpoint has been changed from /mcp to /mc, and a favicon has been added for better branding. Additionally, the configuration now includes an oauth_client_id for seamless integration.

items.title: Upgrade to OAuth 2.0 and Enhance Features in M C P Midjourney 🚀
items.summary: This update migrates the authentication method from SSO to OAuth 2.0 PKCE, enhancing security and user experience. The API endpoint has been changed from /mcp to /mc, and a favicon has been added for better branding. Additionally, configuration for oauth_client_id has been introduced, streamlining the setup process.

items.title: Migrate to OAuth 2.0, update endpoint, and add favicon in M C P Serp 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the previous SSO system with OAuth 2.0 PKCE for improved authentication flow. The API endpoint has been changed from /mcp to /mc, and a favicon redirect has been added for better branding. Configuration now supports an oauth_client_id, enhancing OAuth integration and user experience.

items.title: Enhanced OAuth 2.0 Integration and New Features in M C P Suno 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a migration to OAuth 2.0, replacing the previous SSO login method with a more secure Authorization Code flow. Additionally, a favicon has been added with a new endpoint for better branding, and the main HTTP path has been streamlined from /mcp to /mc. These changes enhance user experience and security across the platform.

items.title: Boost Tornado's Capacity for Claude Code Requests in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses persistent 502 errors experienced by users when utilizing Claude Code with the Claude Messages API. By increasing the Tornado server's max_body_size and max_buffer_size to 500 MB, we ensure that larger conversation contexts can be processed smoothly, enhancing overall user experience.

items.title: Enhance MCP Tool with Async Polling for Image Generation in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an asynchronous polling mechanism for the MCP tool, preventing timeouts during image generation and editing. Key changes include the addition of async methods for generating and editing images, along with a polling strategy to check task completion. The tool interface remains simple while improving reliability and performance.

items.title: Add favicon for Nano Banana in M C P Nano Banana 🎉
items.summary: This update introduces a new route for the favicon, which redirects to the Nano Banana logo hosted on a CDN. The change enhances the visual identity of the application by ensuring the correct icon is displayed. Additionally, it includes modifications to the main.py file to implement this feature.

items.title: Enhance error handling for JetBrains plugin publish in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a critical issue where the `publish-jetbrains` job fails if a CalVer version has already been published on the same day. The fix captures the Gradle output and treats the 'already contains version' message as a non-fatal condition, allowing the workflow to continue smoothly. Other genuine errors will still trigger a failure, ensuring robust error handling.

items.title: Revamped OAuth consent page with full multilingual support in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: The OAuth consent page has been redesigned to include a logo bridge, user badge, styled permissions, and a responsive layout for improved user experience. Additionally, new internationalization keys were added and translated across all 17 supported languages, enhancing global accessibility and consistency.

items.title: Update MCP Endpoint Path for Compatibility in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the MCP endpoint path from `/mcp` to `/mc` to align with the default requests sent by Claude's MCP client. The change resolves the 404 error encountered after successful OAuth authentication. This ensures smoother operation and better integration with the client.

items.title: Revamp OAuth Flow for Enhanced User Experience in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update replaces the internal SSO login flow with a standard OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Grant + PKCE. Users will now encounter a consent page before granting access to MCP, improving security and user awareness. Key changes include new redirect paths and the introduction of an oauth_client_id configuration setting.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Flow with Auto-Provisioning in M C P Nano Banana 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an auto-provisioning feature for API credentials during the OAuth login process. When users log in via Claude connectors without existing credentials, the MCP server now automatically creates a Global Usage Application and Credential, preventing 403 errors. This change aligns with the existing functionality in Dify, improving user experience and accessibility.

items.title: Enhance error handling for API key issues in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the classification of upstream API key errors in the wcnb worker. Instead of exposing sensitive details through a 400 Bad Request, these errors are now categorized as a 500 ApiError with a generic message, enhancing security. The changes apply to all three handlers: nano-banana, veo, and sora.

items.title: Streamline CLAUDE.MD for Clarity in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update simplifies the CLAUDE.MD file by reducing its size by approximately 26%. Key changes include replacing the verbose Available Skills/Tools section with a more compact reference table, removing duplicate checklist items, and trimming down the Important Reminders section. Overall, the document is now more concise while retaining all essential information.

items.title: Enhance error handling for Suno moderation failures in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the error handling in the Suno integration to classify moderation failures as a 403 Forbidden error instead of a 500 Internal Server Error. By adding a condition to check for the 'moderation_failure' error type, the system can now respond appropriately to specific moderation messages. This change improves the reliability of error reporting during audio generation.

items.title: Automate i18n translations from Chinese source updates in Frontend Web 🌐
items.summary: This update introduces an automated process for generating internationalization (i18n) translation updates based on changes in the Chinese (zh-CN) source files. Numerous cache files related to i18n have been renamed or added to support this automation. The change improves translation consistency and reduces manual effort in maintaining multilingual support.

items.title: Boosting Publisher Performance with Enhanced Token Handling in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the robustness of the publisher by addressing overcharging issues related to cached tokens in OpenAI models. Key changes include modifications to the consumption formulas in the model rules and the addition of new tests to ensure the correct application of discounts. All existing tests have passed successfully, ensuring backward compatibility.
